title: SASC Advances Nominations of Feinberg fo...
description: WASHINGTON, DC—Today, the Senate Armed Services Committee voted by roll call to favorably report out the nominations of Mr. Stephen Feinberg to be the...
text:
WASHINGTON, DC—Today, the Senate Armed Services Committee voted by roll call to favorably report out the nominations of Mr. Stephen Feinberg to be the next Deputy Secretary of Defense and Mr. John C. Phelan to be the next Secretary of the Navy.
The nominations were immediately reported to the floor following the Committee’s action.
